title: cymbalaria fragilis
intro: Cymbalaria fragilis, also known as fragile or ivy-leaved toadflax, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate coughs, colds, and skin irritations, promoting overall health and well-being. Cymbalaria fragilis can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal benefits.
